title: e2e: logs test: fix flakes
body:
Yet another case of missing podman-wait. In these two, I see
no reason to run containers detached, so I just removed "-d"

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: This is the [flake in question](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6521115091140608/html/int-podman-fedora-37-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-pod-logs-with-different-colors--1). Flake is in the "different colors" test; I took the liberty of fixing "container names" as well because it looks like an identical problem waiting to happen.
